title: tectaria angulata
intro: Tectaria angulata, also known as the angled tectaria fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria angulata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Tinctures, infusions, and decoctions are among the herbal preparations made from the plant, which is often used in folk remedies in certain parts of the world.
